equipmentMods.trinket: Rain of Flames: When a Meteor lands, it creates a pool of lava that continuously damages enemies. The lava remains for 0.5 seconds, dealing the same damage as Rain of Flames.

equipmentMods.goblet: Vortex: Each vortex spawn 2 small vortexes that deals 50% of the Vortex damage.
equipmentMods.horn: Vortex: When vortexes collide, they turn into a thunderstorm, that deals an additional 200%.
equipmentMods.trinket: Vortex: Gain an additional 4% Lightning Damage blessing when vortexes collide, and gain 10% damage for every Vortex.

equipmentMods.goblet: Arcane Apocalypse: After an explosion, spawns a black hole that damages enemies over time. The black hole deals 50% damage per tick. Each stack decreases tick time by 10%, resulting in more damage over time.

Apocalypse Arcanique : après une explosion, crée un trou noir qui inflige des dégâts aux ennemis sur la durée. Le trou noir inflige 50% de dégâts par activation. Chaque charge réduit le temps d'activation de 10%, entraînant des dégâts plus importants sur la durée.

Fiery Totems: Walking over a Fiery Totem causes it to explode, setting off all other Fiery Totems. Totems that explode without dealing damage spawn an Ember Ghost that tracks enemies and deals 120% damage.

Spinning Blade: Spawns another Axe, dealing 30% more damage over a larger area. For each additional axe, gain 25% additional damage.

Burning Shield: Surrounds your shields with Fire Swords, increasing the damage by 60% and radius by 33%.

Lightning Plasma: Lightning Plasma stays for an additional 0.75 seconds and deals +55% damage.
Arcane Apocalypse: Arcane Apocalypse gains a 50% chance to explode a second time, and a 25% to explode a third time.

Blood Dragons: The dragons jump towards the player, and deal bonus damage the closer they are to their target up to +100%.
Kettenblitz: Wenn sich ein Link verbindet, trifft er das Ziel mit einem Blitz aus dem Himmel, der den gleichen Schaden wie der Kettenblitz verursacht.
